title: dioscorea collettii var. collettii
intro: Dioscorea collettii var. collettii, also known as Collett's yam or Chinese yam, is a type of plant belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. It is native to China and is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of diosgenin, a saponin compound that has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea collettii var. collettii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried root, powder, or decoction, which are often consumed as a tea or added to food.
